race.description: Betavet Winter Series Nmw Pace Final
race.comment: MAJOR BLITZ (6) is flying having all won all four starts this time in. Came from the back row and registered a comfortable win last start, racing wide before working to the front and scoring by nearly 8 metres at Ballarat. Back on the front row and can extend the winning streak. Hard to knock the consistency of KEAYANG SWEETHEART (2) who has yet to miss the top-three in eight starts. Raced parked from a back row draw last start but fought well to go under by a nose at Ballarat. Should enjoy a nice run from this favourable starting position so could go one better. THE STEEL DRAGON (5) won from the back row at Bendigo two back before drawing deeper than this when a respectable third at his most recent appearance at Ballarat. Go well. GUNFORHIRE (1) has been racing well from tough barriers including a win from the second row the last time he raced here. Player from the ace draw.
